name: IdsEdwBnfSumDtlDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_lkp AS (SELECT B.BNF_SUM_DTL_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, B.PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, B.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK, B.COINS_PCT_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_COINS_PCT_AMT, B.COPAY_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_COPAY_AMT, B.DEDCT_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_DEDCT_AMT, B.LMT_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_LMT_AMT, B.STOPLOSS_AMT AS BNF_SUM_DTL_STOPLOSS_AMT, CD2.TRGT_CD AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, CD2.TRGT_CD_NM AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.BNF_SUM_DTL B LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON B.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON B.BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_xfm AS (SELECT BNF_SUM_DTL_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD END AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, BNF_SUM_DTL_COINS_PCT_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_COPAY_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_DEDCT_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_LMT_AMT, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM END AS BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK, BNF_SUM_DTL_STOPLOSS_AMT FROM cte_lkp) SELECT BNF_SUM_DTL_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, PROD_CMPNT_PFX_ID, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, BNF_SUM_DTL_COINS_PCT_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_COPAY_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_DEDCT_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_LMT_AMT, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, BNF_SUM_DTL_TYP_CD_SK, BNF_SUM_DTL_STOPLOSS_AMT FROM cte_xfm
